testcase.name: test_list_users_filter_by_username
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590> non_admin_user_factory = <function non_admin_user_factory.<locals>._factory at 0x10a034180>
@pytest.mark.api def test_list_users_filter_by_username( api_client: httpx.Client, non_admin_user_factory, ) -> None: target_username = "qa_user_search" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, target_username) > non_admin_user_factory(username=target_username)
tests/api/test_users_api.py:60: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'qa_user_search', email = 'qa_user_search@test.local' password = 'Test@1234', role_ids = None
def _factory( username: str | None = None, email: str | None = None, password: str = "Test@1234", role_ids: list[int] | None = None, ) -> tuple[httpx.Client, int, str]: if username is None: username = f"qa_user_{secrets.token_hex(4)}" if email is None: email = f"{username}@test.local" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, username) response = create_user( api_client, username=username, email=email, password=password, role_ids=role_ids, ) > assert response.status_code == 200, f"factory create failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: factory create failed: {"code":422,"msg":"RequestValidationError, [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'qa_user_search@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/conftest.py:118: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_list_users_unauthenticated_rejected
testcase.failure:
unauthenticated_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x10a0f9590>
@pytest.mark.api def test_list_users_unauthenticated_rejected(unauthenticated_client: httpx.Client) -> None: response = unauthenticated_client.get("/api/v1/user/list")
> assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 422 == 401 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/test_users_api.py:79: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_user_detail_success

@pytest.mark.api def test_get_user_detail_success( api_client: httpx.Client, non_admin_user_factory, ) -> None: > _, user_id, _ = non_admin_user_factory(username="qa_detail_user") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/api/test_users_api.py:90: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'qa_detail_user', email = 'qa_detail_user@test.local' password = 'Test@1234', role_ids = None
def _factory( username: str | None = None, email: str | None = None, password: str = "Test@1234", role_ids: list[int] | None = None, ) -> tuple[httpx.Client, int, str]: if username is None: username = f"qa_user_{secrets.token_hex(4)}" if email is None: email = f"{username}@test.local" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, username) response = create_user( api_client, username=username, email=email, password=password, role_ids=role_ids, ) > assert response.status_code == 200, f"factory create failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: factory create failed: {"code":422,"msg":"RequestValidationError, [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'qa_detail_user@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/conftest.py:118: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_create_user_with_role_success
test_create_user_duplicate_email_rejected
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590> non_admin_user_factory = <function non_admin_user_factory.<locals>._factory at 0x10a05a520>
@pytest.mark.api def test_create_user_duplicate_email_rejected( api_client: httpx.Client, non_admin_user_factory, ) -> None: seed_email = "qa_dup@test.local" seed_username = f"qa_dup_seed_{secrets.token_hex(4)}" duplicate_username = "qa_dup_2" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, duplicate_username)
> non_admin_user_factory(username=seed_username, email=seed_email)
tests/api/test_users_api.py:167: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'qa_dup_seed_86df1fe8', email = 'qa_dup@test.local' password = 'Test@1234', role_ids = None
def _factory( username: str | None = None, email: str | None = None, password: str = "Test@1234", role_ids: list[int] | None = None, ) -> tuple[httpx.Client, int, str]: if username is None: username = f"qa_user_{secrets.token_hex(4)}" if email is None: email = f"{username}@test.local" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, username) response = create_user( api_client, username=username, email=email, password=password, role_ids=role_ids, ) > assert response.status_code == 200, f"factory create failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: factory create failed: {"code":422,"msg":"RequestValidationError, [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'qa_dup@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/conftest.py:118: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_update_user_rewrites_roles
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590> seeded_two_roles = ((76, 'qa_role_8e1875f5'), (77, 'qa_role_34e78e3e'))
@pytest.mark.api def test_update_user_rewrites_roles( api_client: httpx.Client, seeded_two_roles: tuple[tuple[int, str], tuple[int, str]], ) -> None: (role_a_id, _), (role_b_id, _) = seeded_two_roles src_username = "qa_update_src" src_email = "qa_update_src@test.local" target_username = "qa_updated" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, src_username) safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, target_username)
create_response = create_user( api_client, username=src_username, email=src_email, password="Test@1234", role_ids=[role_a_id], ) > assert create_response.status_code == 200, create_response.text E AssertionError: {"code":422,"msg":"RequestValidationError, [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'qa_update_src@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/test_users_api.py:229: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_update_user_not_found
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590>
@pytest.mark.api def test_update_user_not_found(api_client: httpx.Client) -> None: safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, "ghost") try: response = api_client.post( "/api/v1/user/update", json={ "id": NONEXISTENT_USER_ID, "email": "ghost@test.local", "username": "ghost", "is_active": True, "is_superuser": False, "role_ids": [], "dept_id": 0, }, ) body = response.json()
> assert response.status_code == 404 E assert 422 == 404 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/test_users_api.py:290: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_delete_user_success
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590>
@pytest.mark.api def test_delete_user_success(api_client: httpx.Client) -> None: target_username = "qa_delete_user" target_email = "qa_delete_user@test.local" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, target_username)

testcase.name: test_reset_password_normal_user_success
testcase.failure:
api_client = <httpx.Client object at 0x109f22590> base_url = 'http://localhost:9999'
@pytest.mark.api def test_reset_password_normal_user_success( api_client: httpx.Client, base_url: str, ) -> None: target_username = "qa_reset_user" target_email = "qa_reset_user@test.local" original_password = "Original@123" safe_delete_user_by_username(api_client, target_username)
create_response = create_user( api_client, username=target_username, email=target_email, password=original_password, role_ids=[], ) > assert create_response.status_code == 200, create_response.text E AssertionError: {"code":422,"msg":"RequestValidationError, [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'qa_reset_user@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
tests/api/test_users_api.py:362: AssertionError
